name: Communications Outbound Notification
description: One approved notification delivered to a named destination with an auditable source and receipt.
audience: Teams sending operational updates after completed work
problem: Status updates are easy to send to the wrong audience, at the wrong time, or without evidence that the underlying work is complete.
outcome: One approved notification delivered to a named destination with an auditable source and receipt.
whyAi: AI can turn a completed run or decision into audience-appropriate copy, while route and send policy control delivery.
operatorPath: Name the completed result, audience, destination, and urgency.
Review the message when policy requires it.
Approve the send or keep the message as a draft.
agentPath: Verify the source result and named delivery target.
Draft only what the evidence supports and resolve the allowed route.
Send once with idempotency and record the provider receipt.
recovery: If the target or route is unclear, keep the draft and ask for the missing destination.
If delivery status is uncertain, inspect the existing action receipt before retrying.
safeStoppingPoints: Stop with an approved draft when sending was not authorized.
prerequisites: A completed source result or decision
A named communication target and allowed route
proof: Provider message id and idempotency state
whenToUse: A run, decision, or agent action needs a human-facing notification.
The agent has explicit recipients/channels and approved message content.

stages.title: Confirm Notification Need
stages.summary: Read the goal and recent action calls before composing a notification.

stages.title: Compose Explicit Payload
stages.summary: Produce exact recipient/channel, subject, body, and optional origin refs.

stages.title: Send Notification
stages.summary: Execute the explicitly granted send action.
